title: slinky N' slimy
description: a mod that adds a slimy friend
body:
# **This Project is no longer being worked on/updated**


this mod add caecilian whats a caecilian its a animal that lives in tropical habitats it also lives underground and very rarely seen

 

how do i get caecilian?

- you can find there eggs in jungle temple chest and dispesers 

 

what to ceacilians do?

- they have a chace to dig up stuff in sus sand when feed fermeted spider eye (ps may change)

 

caecilian variants?

- caecilian have four variants one that can be gotten by breeding above y128 the normal one between y128 and y 32 and one under y32 and the final one you will have to figure out your selfs 


caecilian treasure???

- caecilians can dig up a few new armor trims is sus sand but you need to give a fermeted spider eye
